meta.title: Anagraw n udabu d usebded n isefka

hero.title: Anagraw n udabu d usebded n isefka
hero.lead: IATF yettarra iswiyen n tuqqna d wid n medden, d wid i yzemren ad t-ɣren d wid izemren ad tt-ḥerzen.
support: Asebter-a yessefhem d acu i d-yettwaḥsab, amek i ttwaḥerzen yisekla, d acu n temsalt i yellan deg uḍebsi n useklu deffir ma yettwaqbel.

cards.title: Ahil n usegmi
paragraphs: IATF yettqebbel leqdic i d-yettmagaren tiɣawsiwin n tidet deg uḍris, yerna yesεa azal ifazen i medden.
Asenfar yessefk ad yesɛu lfayda nnig n uḥric n uxeddim weḥd-s, yerna ilaq ad yeddu d amḍan agdud.
I useqdec n web, IATF [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) D tirmit i d-yefkan srid wid yessexdamen tiknulujiyin yettεawnen i d ttbut n wayen ixeddmen deg uxeddim n tidet.

cards.title: Aseqdec n usenfaṛ
paragraphs: Asumer yezmer ad yettwaqbel mi ara d-ibin unadi belli:
items: d ayen i d-yettawin ɣer yiwet n teḥwaǧt n ṣṣeḥ n tuqqna.
Ugur-nni iban akken ilaq akken ad t-nwali
leqdic-nni yeddukel d lmendad n IATF
yella ubrid i d-yettawin ɣer uḥezzeb neɣ aseɣzef.

cards.title: Tamanaɣt n usebter
paragraphs: Iseḍfaren yettwaqeblen ttwasnulfan sɣur tuddsa n GitHub n IATF.
Iḍebsiyen ttɣimin din akken yal aɣawas ad yeṭṭef axxam agdud ibeddlen, ɣas ma ibeddel win i t-iḥerzen.

cards.title: Aḍebsi n yizerfan
paragraphs: Iseggasen n IATF ssexdamen tizenzi n copyleft ma ur d-yenni ara wayeḍ deg usenfaṛ:

maintainer.title: Ajenyuṛ ama d win yettḥadaren
paragraphs: Yal usenfaṛ yettwaqeblen ilaq ad yesɛu yiwen n usinag neɣ win yettḥadaren. Amdan-a yezmer ad yesεu azref n useḥbiber ɣer usebter yerna ilaq ad:
items: ad d-nεawed neɣ ad neḥrez iɣeblan d yisteqsiyen n usekles
xdem lxedma-k akken ad tt-fehmen wiyaḍ.
maintainer.footnote: D aya i d tamsalt deg uḍebsi. Tamsalt n tnezduɣt teqqim deg IATF. Tamsalt da d aseḥbiber n usebter, asebter asnaddal, d usegmi n tmetti  mačči d asewwi aselkam ur nesεi azref, asdukel s wudem awurman, neɣ izerfan n uẓeṭṭa n yiseqdacen beṛṛa n tkarḍa n webrid.

publicDevelopment.title: Asnulfu n tmetti
paragraphs: Iseggasen i d-yettwaselken sɣur IATF ttwaddmen s wudem unṣib.
items: Isebtaren i yellan deg tkarḍa n webrid
publicDevelopment.footnote: Tamusni n usenfaṛ ur ilaq ara ad teqqim kan deg tceqqufin neɣ deg tbewwaṭ n tuffɣa.

paragraphs: IATF ixeddem s wudem agdudani s umata. Tiɣriwin i d-yettasen ɣer IAT F s web, imayl, Discord, GitHub, neɣ isefka-nniḍen n l'IAT F zemren ad uɣalen d isekkilen n tiɣriyin igdudaniyen.

Aḍebsi n usuter amatu mačči d izen n tazwara. IATF yezmer ad d-yefk agmuḍ, ad iseggem, neɣ ad yesbeddle asuter uqbel aselkim akken ad yezmer uḥwaǧ n tuqqna akken ur d-yettban ara isallen imdanen ur nelhi.
Iḍebsiyen n usuter n medden zemren ad ttwaḥerzen deg useqqamu n GitHub n IATF, deg usmel-agi, neɣ deg sin.

Qbel ad d-teffeɣ tesɣunt, IATF ad yekkes isefka n umsawal n umdan ur nelhi, tansawin n tnezduɣt, d isefkan i d-yettakken tamedyezt ɣef imseqdacen n teknulujiyin inehhanen, ala ma yella d ayen iwulmen d wayen ilaqen.

Discord yettwaseqdac i useggem ur nban ara. IATF ur d-yettak ara tiɣawsiwin n Discord s umata, d Discord i yettḥekmen ɣef uḥezzeb n yiznan. Tiwtilin i d-yeṭṭfen deg Discord ilaq ad d-ttwaseklesent deg uḍebsi aɣelnaw deg GitHub neɣ deg usebter n usenfaṛ.
Iḍebsiyen n usuter ur ttilin ara deg usebter n unadi ma yella d ayen izemren deg tikli. Agdud anamek-is yezmer ad yettwaḥseb. Ur d-yettak ara anamek i usnulfu s unadi n yismawen.

IATF yezmer ad d-yesseɣti neɣ ad yekkes isefka seg isebtaren i yettwaḥekmen sɣur-s, maca ur yezmir ara ad yefk tilelli i usekkes seg ixef wis tlata, tiɣriwin, tiferkiwin, isekkilen n usebter, imsuɣulen n unadi, Discord, neɣ isennanen-nniḍen ibeṛṛaniyen.
Ma ilaq ad yeqqim izen d awḥid, ur t-ttceggiḍ ara s yisekkilen n IATF.

chair.lead: Aselway yesεa aselway n IATF deg uḥric n taggayt.

duties.title: D acu i ixeddem ukersi-nni
items: Yettaṭṭaf izerfan n bab ɣef tuddsa n GitHub n IATF
Isebtaren i sɛan azday ɣer "acceptation des projets" d "archivage des décisions"
Yettak-d iman-is d amkan n umsawal agdud i IATF.
Yettnadi ɣef tefranin-nni n yal aseggas.
duties.footnote: Aselway ur yeţţunefk ara i IATF ad d-yefk i yiman-is, ad ixdem axeddim s lexlaṣ, neɣ ad yexdem leεwayed n useqdec, yerna ur yezmir ara ad yekkes tiɣawsiwin n imḍebbren n umḍebber deg wayen yerzan aselway asertan.

election.title: Tifranin n yal aseggas
paragraphs: Aselway yettwafren yiwet n tikelt deg useggas.

Wid yesεan azref ad ssufren, d wid i d-yeṭṭfen amkan n useḥbiber deg kra n usebter n IATF deg useggas-nni, yerna xedmen ma drus yiwet n tesɣunt i usebtar n Iatf deg usegwas-nni. Yal amesbaṭli yesεa azref ɣur-s yiwen n uḍebsi. Amennay s waṭas n yiḍebsen i irebḥen; deg tegnit n uḥezzeb, ad d-yili usefrar wis tlata deg waggur n dujember.
Tifranin-a ttilint s wudem n umeslay n GitHub deg usebter n udabu n IATF i d-yettwasbaden, ihi imnadiyen, tuṭṭfa, d agmuḍ llan akk d aḥric seg uẓeṭṭa n medden.

continuity.title: Taɣdemt
paragraphs: Ma ur d-ilint ara tefranin deg yiwen n useggas, aselway-nni n tura ad ikemmel deg umkan-is alamma d tifranin i d-iteddun.
Aselway yezmer ad yeǧǧ amkan-is di yal taswiεt.

chair.footnote: Amur n uselway yettwasemres deg useggas n 2026 i wakken ad d-yili useḥbiber deg uẓeṭṭa n tkebbanit.

states.title: Talɣa n usenfaṛ
paragraphs: Iswiyen ssexdamen-d yiwet n terbaɛt tamecṭuḥt n yiɣlanen n tmetti:
states.footnote: Tiɣawsiwin-a ttaǧǧant ad yeshel uḥeddad ad yettwasken.

reassignment.title: Aεawed n useqdec d usekles
paragraphs: Ma yella win i d-yettḥadar ad yeffeɣ neɣ ad yeqqim ur ixeddem ara, IATF yezmer ad d-yerr tamsalt, ad yeḥbes usnulfu, neɣ ad yerr asefru.
Asenfar yezmer daɣen ad yettwaseggem mi ara d-yeffeɣ wayen i d-teḥwaǧ tazwara, ma yeḥbes useggem, neɣ ma dayen ur yezmir ara ad ikemmel uxeddim.
reassignment.footnote: Iseggasen i d-yettwaḥerzen ttuɣalen ttwalin medden, ala ma tella ssebba taḥerṣant ara yeǧǧen aya ad yeḍru.

items: aseḥbiber n waṭas n wussan i yal asebter
boundaries.footnote: IATF d amedya n usentel agejdan, mačči d aseqdec n usiweḍ s tugdut.
